creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update x11/xfce4-clipman-plugin from version 0.8.1 to version 0.9.0

- respect WITHOUT_NLS (although in the configure script --disable-nls gets overridden by the detection of xgettext)
- new localizations
- new dependency on libexo

Full changelog at http://goodies.xfce.org/releases/xfce4-clipman-plugin/ChangeLog

Tested with 'portlint -A' and 'port test' and runtime

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
